submitAfter: docs/tasks/spells/SPELL_PHASE_1_JULES_ENVIRONMENT_SNAPSHOT_RECEIPT.md records passed or approved waived result and says Package 2 may dispatch
title: Spell Phase 1 Package 2: premade party and gear
body: Use the exact Jules prompt packet in docs/tasks/spells/PACKAGE_2_PREMADE_PARTY_GEAR_JULES_PROMPT.md. Scope: equip all 13 level-1 premade characters with class-appropriate working gear, verify caster spellbook/preparation legality, and repair only narrow combat conversion issues needed for AC/baseAC and ranged weapon range. Worker: Jules. Branch: jules/spells-package2-premade-party-gear. Do not broaden into character creator UI, character sheet spellbook UI, broad spell schema/runtime architecture, AI arbitration policy, or Symphony orchestration files. The Jules Environment receipt now allows Package 2 dispatch after the scoped setup snapshot passed.
expectedFiles: optional narrow premade legality audit/test under existing test or script structure
